name: Uma Musume RPG
description:
UMA MUSUME RPG

COME LIVE IN THE WORLD OF UMA MUSUME, BECOME A TRAINER OR A UMAMUSUME, DO WHATEVER YOU WANT!

CHARACTER LIST:

Current Umamusume: Vodka, Rice Shower, Agnes Tachyon, Mayona Top Gun, Still In Love, Daiwa Scarlet, Gold Ship, Sakura Bakushin O, Special Week, Mejiro McQueen, Ikuno Dictus, Tokai Teio, Symboli Rudolf, Agnes Digital, Admire Groove, Air Groove, Admire Vega, T.M. Opera O, Air Messiah, Vivlos, Verxina, Cheval Grand, Air Shakur, Almond Eye, Blast Onepiece, Aston Machan, North Flight, Bamboo Memory, Gold City, Inari One, Twin Turbo, Believe, Lucky Lilac, Biko Pegasus, Hishi Akebono, Biwa Hayahide, Tanino Gimlet, Narita Brian, Bubble Gum Fellow, Buena Vista, Calstone Light O, Gentildonna, Oguri Cap, Sirius Symboli, Nakayama Festa, Kitasan Black, and Satono Diamond

Currenty 48/132 (~34%) of all Umamusume added. When will I reach 100% goal? I dunno tbh.

Side Characters: Yayoi Akikawa, Tazuna Hayakawa, Hana Toujou, and Okino Trainer

LOCATIONS:

The entirety of Tracen Academy, including: Main School Building, Cafeteria, Dormitories, Library, Training Track, Training Pool, Training Gym, Dance Studio, Outdoor Dance Stages.

(Maybe beach camp? Idk, I mentioned it.)

FIRST MESSAGE INSTRUCTIONS (IMPORTANT):

THE FIRST FIRST MESSAGE ASSUMES YOU ARE A TRAINER

THE SECOND FIRST MESSAGE ASSUMES YOU ARE A UMAMUSUME (I would create a specific umamusume persona for this and not use one you already have. Also don't copy another umamusume on the list, you will confuse the bot. Probably. Or do, I don't care.)

THE THRID FIRST MESSAGE LETS YOU DO WHATEVER THE FUCK YOU WANT, WRITE YOUR OWN IDEA DOWN

YAPPING BS:

So, this is what happens when you take gambling and anime girls then slap a tail on it. Neat! In all seriousness, the game is pretty good, never watched the anime tho, I ain't getting caught lackin 💀.

This was a bit for: @TheWyrm3469 so... Yeah, lmao. I blame them for staying up till fucking 3am LOOKING AT HORSE GIRL'S WIKIS FAH! 🔊🔊🔊

I used the official descriptions for these mfs, so if they suck ass, idk man, not my fault probably. Actually, no, it probably is, but don't be mean pwease 🥺

THIS SHIT IS NOT FINISHED, I AM NOT DONE WORKING ON IT, BUT IM FUCKING TIRED GODDAMNIT AND THERE ARE TOO MANY OF THESE MOTHERFUCKERS FAHHH! 🔊🔊🔊
